name: Floral Vines Patio Umbrella Blue - Roller Rabbit x Target
description:
Upgrade your outdoor oasis with this Patio Umbrella from Roller Rabbit x Target. Designed with a steel frame and a fabric canopy with fringe. It requires a centered pole umbrella base (not included) and the weather-resistant construction promotes lasting outdoor use.

Beloved for their colorful prints and uplifting styles, Roller Rabbit adds more joy to any journey. Now, they’re joining Target to celebrate travel, friendship and togetherness in this limited-edition collection designed to inspire your ultimate spring adventure.
